description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy that triggers on push of tags matching 'v*'. In a single windows-latest job, check out the repository with submodules, set up MSBuild and .NET Core 5.0.100-rc.1.20452.10, restore dependencies, build and test Impostor.Server, then publish and zip it for multiple platforms (win-x64, linux-x64, linux-arm, linux-arm64, osx-x64). Create a draft release and upload the zipped assets to it.
